scoring_note: Primary sort = callback_op (operator-lens) DESC. Roles re-scored under the operator lens carry callback_op + D_spike_operator. Ten roles from the first Jun-9 pass (Conduct, Gradient Labs, Sequence, Specter, Magentic, ivee, Marloo, Wing, Seamflow, Siena) were scored under the prior callback_v2/v3 system and were NOT re-scored under the operator lens; for ranking continuity their callback_v3 is used as the callback_op proxy and they have no D_spike_operator. callback_v3 shown as secondary column throughout.

ranked.title: Founding Brand & Growth (Growth Generalist)
ranked.biggest_lever: De-prioritises seniority + prior B2B experience; wants a creative operator who has built brands/communities/companies from zero (founder-read, not ATS).
ranked.biggest_risk: MARKETING role (down-ranked vs operator intent); most-consequential first marketing hire = very high creative-taste bar; 6wks open.
ranked.apply_move: Show-don't-tell creative-led application via Ashby.
ranked.caveat: MARKETING/GROWTH role - not operator/FA per user's stated intent; not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy).

ranked.title: Agent Operations Lead
ranked.biggest_lever: Literally 'build agentic workflows with Claude Code/Cowork, n8n, LangGraph, MCPs' - 1:1 match for Ryan's Claude-Code agent-building + first-employee systems-from-scratch.
ranked.biggest_risk: 'Lead' title + expects deep multi-agent orchestration depth; Ryan's agent work is self-taught - must evidence shipped systems.
ranked.apply_move: Apply via Ashby with a Loom/write-up of a real Claude-Code/MCP agent workflow framed as operational leverage.
ranked.caveat: Title says 'Lead' (senior-IC, not exec-excluded) - must prove concrete agentic systems, not just usage.

ranked.title: Operations Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Pure generalist-operator brief - 'run high-impact projects end-to-end, scale processes, build systems to run more agencies without adding headcount; fast-track to Ops Manager'. Mirrors Minima FA record.
ranked.biggest_risk: Not core agentic-AI (AI-enabled proptech roll-up); high-volume real-world ops; pitched at development-pathway seniority so upside may sit below agent-builder ambitions.
ranked.apply_move: Apply via Greenhouse TODAY while day-0 fresh; emphasise 1->30 scale-up + fundraising-ops + position agent skills as automation lever.
ranked.caveat: Proptech roll-up, not agentic-AI product; earlier seniority band.

ranked.title: Product Marketer - London
ranked.biggest_lever: Prizes AI-native operator: 'builds automated content engines, uses Claude in multiple brand voices, ships landing pages with Cursor'; founder-read; £70-85k.
ranked.biggest_risk: MARKETING role (down-ranked); B2B fintech/CFO audience = domain ramp; competes with marketers who 'speak CFO'.
ranked.apply_move: Reframe Minima as AI-native content/growth engine + Claude/Cursor artifacts.
ranked.caveat: MARKETING role - not operator/FA per user intent; not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy).

ranked.title: AI Delivery Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Forgiving, ambiguity-friendly, no-engineer-required reqs ('comfortable without a fully defined playbook', 'technically curious - don't need to be an engineer'); fresh ~4d posting at ~40-person founder-led Series A; human hiring-manager read in a low-competition window.
ranked.biggest_risk: Core is customer delivery/implementation + compliance/governance in regulated financial services - adjacent to but not Ryan's community-led spike; he meets the bar without standing out.
ranked.apply_move: Apply NOW while fresh; frame ambiguity-navigation + cross-functional FA execution hard.
ranked.caveat: Delivery/implementation (regulated fintech), not Ryan's spike; not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy=77).

ranked.title: Integration Associate (Post-M&A)
ranked.biggest_lever: Cross-functional execution under ambiguity (operational/client/team integration of acquired agencies) maps to FA cross-functional record.
ranked.biggest_risk: Narrower than a true FA - executes alongside an Integration Manager, less agent-building leverage, weaker operator-spike than the Ops Associate sibling.
ranked.apply_move: Apply via Greenhouse as SECONDARY Dwelly application; lead with stakeholder-management/coordination evidence.
ranked.caveat: REPOST (refreshed day-0 but orig Feb); secondary to the Dwelly Ops Associate; M&A-integration-specialised.

ranked.title: Founding Growth Marketer
ranked.biggest_lever: Zero-to-one mandate 'first Growth Marketer, work directly with founders, turn early signals into repeatable playbooks'; Sequoia-backed 11-person team = CEO reads applications; £90-100k.
ranked.biggest_risk: MARKETING role (down-ranked); 'enterprise B2B early-stage growth' preference vs Ryan's community-led consumer-crypto; 93d stale (G=10); procurement/supply-chain domain.
ranked.apply_move: Tailored CEO-direct pitch leading with $4.5m presale playbook + AI-automation artifact.
ranked.caveat: MARKETING role + STALE 93d; not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy).

ranked.title: Operations Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Clears every stated requirement + all three preferreds (early-stage startup, high agency, AI-tools-to-multiply-output); 'any experience level welcome'; $374M raised, $160M B + $106M B1 at $2.6B (May-Jun 2026), London office scaling; £50-70k.
ranked.biggest_risk: 6-7 days/week in-office + 48hr in-person work trial for a generalist ops role where Ryan is adequate (not spiked); competes with consulting/banking/military profiles the listing courts; insurance domain (anti-fit).
ranked.apply_move: Apply via YC; only commit if genuinely open to intense in-person insurance-ops.
ranked.caveat: 6-7 day in-office + 48hr work trial; YC posting date may be sticky (medium confidence); regulated-insurance anti-fit domain.

ranked.title: Founding Growth Lead
ranked.biggest_lever: 4+ yrs growth at seed-A startups (Ryan 4.4yr Minima); 'genuinely fluent in AI' with workflow-building (form requires an AI workflow example); founder-read 2-person team.
ranked.biggest_risk: MARKETING/GROWTH role (down-ranked); explicitly B2B OUTBOUND sales-pipeline ownership (cold outreach, deal closure) - no enterprise B2B sales track record; high media hype = applicant volume.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with $4.5m presale reframed as zero-to-one pipeline + the Claude-Code AI workflow example the form demands.
ranked.caveat: MARKETING/GROWTH + outbound-sales-pipeline focus; estimated date; not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy).

ranked.title: GTM Associate, London
ranked.biggest_lever: Low hard bar (2+ yrs customer-facing); must-have 'active AI power user for 10x productivity' = direct Claude-Code hit; 'own outcomes across GTM/ops/product/hiring, launch manual experiments before scaling' = founding-generalist; UK auth required (Ryan qualifies).
ranked.biggest_risk: GTM/sales-conversion lean (adjacent not identical); wealthtech/financial-advice domain (anti-fit); £40-70k floor dips below £50k; 78d stale.
ranked.apply_move: Frame $4.5m presale + 50k->5k lifecycle conversion as GTM outcomes; lead AI-power-user must-have with Claude-Code workflows.
ranked.caveat: GTM/sales lean + wealthtech domain + £40k floor; 78d stale; not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy).

ranked.title: AI Strategy & Operations Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: 'Foundational hire... building foundational processes for the first time' across Finance/Legal/People/General Ops - first-employee-style operator brief matching Minima FA breadth + fundraising-ops.
ranked.biggest_risk: London is SECONDARY location (Copenhagen primary) - confirm eligibility; 62d aged; finance-ops leaning vs pure generalist.
ranked.apply_move: Confirm London eligibility FIRST (message recruiter); if confirmed, apply via Ashby leading with fundraising-ops + budget-accountability.
ranked.caveat: London is secondary location (verify); aged 62d; finance-ops tilt.

ranked.title: Forward Deployed AI Accelerator, Operations
ranked.biggest_lever: Almost line-for-line Ryan's rarest spike: 'hands-on experience building AI tools/agents/automations/workflows' + 'Claude/Claude Code proficiency' (preferred). Most FDAI-Accelerator applicants are prompt-dabblers; Ryan ships Claude Code agents since Aug 2023 + has operator/cross-functional context.
ranked.biggest_risk: Two compounding strikes: (1) SCREENING - 2,000+ person regulated fintech runs recruiter/ATS keyword gates; non-traditional, Skills-section-less, crypto-not-payments CV is exactly what gets binned; (2) COMPETITION/DOMAIN - big-brand high-volume ($198K headline press), zero payments/fintech signal, no warm path.
ranked.apply_move: Apply via Ashby BUT reframe CV top with explicit 'AI tooling' one-liner naming Claude Code + a concrete agent/workflow + outcome (beat the ATS keyword scan); find a warm path via LinkedIn + 90s Loom.
ranked.caveat: MODERATE hidden-gates: fintech-domain gap + ATS keyword screen on non-traditional CV; momentum only neutral (post-70%-haircut recovery); posting date estimated.

ranked.title: Operations Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Freshly posted (7d) at well-funded ($60M Series B) AI-native legal company scaling ops; generalist ops-execution fits the operator lens.
ranked.biggest_risk: POOLE not London (he is relocating to London); legal AI is an explicit anti-fit domain; role is lawyer-support flavoured, not founder-adjacent 0->1.
ranked.apply_move: Borderline - only pursue if open to Poole/remote + legal-tech; otherwise skip. (Lawhive 'Founders Office' listing is CLOSED.)
ranked.caveat: POOLE location (not London) + legal-AI anti-fit domain + low D_spike_operator (45); lawyer-support flavour.

ranked.title: AI Operations Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Centres on building agentic AI workflows (Zapier, Claude Cowork, n8n, prompt eng) = direct Claude-Code spike hit; soft reqs (only ONE of Salesforce/Zapier/prompt-eng/automation); 'among first 25 applicants'.
ranked.biggest_risk: Half ops-automation builder, half Salesforce-admin/commercial-ops (invoicing, supplier onboarding, SLAs) - the process-rigor half is anti-fit; reports to Ops Director (not founder); funding stale (2023).
ranked.apply_move: Lead with a built Claude-Code/n8n agent artifact, not a CV.
ranked.caveat: Half Salesforce-admin/commercial-ops (anti-fit); neutral momentum (no fresh raise); Manager title in-band.

ranked.title: GTM Associate, Europe (Founding GTM Associate)

ranked.biggest_risk: Leans hard on outbound B2B sales mechanics (cold account lists, outbound sequences, SQL conversion, multi-threading CFOs) - Ryan's GTM is community-led/presale/PR, NOT enterprise outbound; fintech domain outside crypto/AI-tooling.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with founding-operator narrative (first employee 1->30, $4.5m presale 15x ROI, $6.5m Series A investor events); reframe community-led GTM as repeatable demand-gen; address outbound gap with presale revenue ownership.
ranked.caveat: Outbound B2B SALES mechanics core (anti-fit) + fintech domain; but elite momentum (H=92) + explicit founding-operator framing.

ranked.title: AI Operations Specialist
ranked.biggest_lever: Central ask = hands-on builder deploying Claude/n8n/Zapier agentic workflows into real ops (careers page confirms Claude Code in internal stack) - direct Claude-Code overlap; AI cohort hiring (3 concurrent AI roles).
ranked.biggest_risk: Explicit '2-5 yrs product/business operations/strategy/TPM' gate - Ryan's marketing/community/FA titles don't keyword-match; ~971-person fintech recruiter/ATS screen; regulated-adjacent domain, not differentiated.
ranked.apply_move: Reframe FA/operator experience as business-operations; lead hard with concrete Claude-Code agentic-workflow builds.
ranked.caveat: Titled-ops/TPM keyword gate + large-fintech ATS screen; mature 971-person co (not founder-read).

ranked.title: Growth Generalist

ranked.biggest_risk: MARKETING/GROWTH role; $11B hot lab + remote-global + no experience bar = enormous applicant pool through recruiter/ATS; non-traditional CV statistically screened out; 138d evergreen.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only with a referral or standout creative artifact to jump the recruiter queue.
ranked.caveat: MARKETING/GROWTH; hyper-saturated funnel (138d, G=10); not operator-rescored (callback_v3 proxy).

ranked.title: Founders Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Claude-Code automation + founding-generalist 'turn ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams' maps onto the AI-workflows + strategic-projects part of JD; founder/CEO-led hire (own ATS, not faceless).
ranked.biggest_risk: Front-loads EA/diary/scheduling work; non-AI creative studio (off-domain); possible sub-£50k pay; hard NW7 commute until London relocation.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only if open to a creative-studio CoS path with EA-heavy ramp.
ranked.caveat: EA/diary-heavy ramp + non-AI creative studio (off-domain) + uncertain sub-£50k pay.

ranked.title: Research Program Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Frontier lab (DeepMind/OpenAI/Anthropic alumni) wants 'high-leverage operators, force multipliers who bring clarity to ambiguity' - echoes FA spike; elite company quality (C=90).
ranked.biggest_risk: Two compounding gates: (1) PRIMARY location NYC/SF, London only secondary, Ryan UK-only auth = likely deprioritised; (2) technical research-program-mgmt in frontier ML training infra (Megatron, cluster reliability) - zero ML-infra background, indexes on research-process rigor (his weakness).
ranked.apply_move: Only if applying explicitly as London-based + reframing for least-infra variant ('Model Development'); honest call - below 60% bar.
ranked.caveat: London is SECONDARY (NY/SF primary) + ML-infra-heavy research-PM (anti-fit); Indeed re-index masked true 41d age.

ranked.title: Chief of Staff
ranked.biggest_lever: BEST-IN-BATCH warm-path + screening: apply via 300-word email direct to founder (rajen@governr.ai), 'strong candidates hear back within 48 hours' - founder-read, NO ATS (E=95, C=95).
ranked.biggest_risk: Same-day financial-model + investor-pitch + strategy expectation at 'founder-level intensity' may exceed Ryan's evidenced finance-modelling depth; AI-governance domain doesn't pull on crypto/community spikes; LISTING stale (LinkedIn expired) though SEAT likely open via evergreen email.
ranked.apply_move: Send a tight 300-word pitch to rajen@governr.ai leading with seed->Series A operator credibility + fundraising-support + Claude-Code building; verify seat open in the email.
ranked.caveat: Standalone financial-modelling is a stretch; stale listing (verify seat); AI-governance domain off Ryan's spikes; CoS title founder-adjacent (not exec-excluded).

ranked.title: Founder's Associate Intern
ranked.biggest_lever: Operator/FA spike + UK-local + 'built agents with Claude Code' maps to an observability-AI tooling startup; high human-screen (C=95).
ranked.biggest_risk: INTERN/junior-band scope - at ~6.4yr first-employee operator he reads as overqualified flight-risk; the better-band FA/CoS (~$100k) Tracer posting is NOT in the live board API (closed/delisted).
ranked.apply_move: Likely skip as an intern; if pursued, pitch as overqualified + ask whether the non-intern FA/CoS seat is reopening.
ranked.caveat: INTERN/junior band - overqualified flight-risk; the proper-band FA seat is closed.

ranked.title: Customer Success Manager

ranked.biggest_risk: No CS/account-management background; demanding depot-field/early-start logistics (3d/wk onsite); industrial/construction/waste-logistics domain (anti-fit) - three stacked mismatches.
ranked.apply_move: Apply only if genuinely open to field/depot work.

ranked.biggest_risk: MBB/IB-flavoured pedigree bar + heavily technical/consulting team culture; regulated TIC domain (aerospace/medtech) anti-fit; current need is enterprise deal-closing not community growth; 189d very stale.

top5.title: Agent Operations Lead
top5.why: Highest operator-lens score in the entire live set (callback_op 80) AND the cleanest spike match: D_spike_operator 95, the JD literally lists 'build agentic workflows with Claude Code/Cowork, n8n, LangGraph, MCPs'. Green/HOT momentum (H=92, $30M Series A closed 2026-05-28), fresh (15d, G=70), London/UK-remote, agentic-AI product. Genuinely live, operator-shaped, UK-eligible.
top5.caveat: Title says 'Lead' (senior-IC, not exec) and expects deep multi-agent orchestration depth - Ryan's agent work is self-taught, so he must evidence concrete systems he has SHIPPED, not just tool usage.
top5.apply_move: Apply via Ashby with a 2-3 min Loom or write-up of a REAL Claude-Code/MCP agent workflow he built (the competitor-intel pipeline) framed as 'operational leverage', tied to his Minima 1->30 first-employee 'systems without technical debt' record.

top5.title: Operations Associate
top5.why: Second-highest operator-lens score (78) and a textbook generalist-operator brief - 'run high-impact projects end-to-end, scale processes, build systems to run more agencies without headcount, fast-track to Ops Manager'. STRONG green momentum (H=85, $93M Feb 2026, 300->1,500 headcount), day-0 fresh (2d, G=88), London, operator-shaped not sales/CS. Highest-A in the live set (85).
top5.caveat: AI-ENABLED proptech roll-up, not a core agentic-AI product, and the seat is pitched at a development-pathway/earlier seniority - comp and intellectual upside may sit below his agent-builder ambitions.
top5.apply_move: Apply via Greenhouse TODAY while day-0; lead with the Minima 1->30 scale-up + fundraising-ops + 'built repeatable workflows', and position agent-building as a way to automate Dwelly's ops/integration backlog.

top5.title: AI Delivery Associate
top5.why: Operator-shaped delivery role (NOT marketing) with the most forgiving reqs in the set - 'comfortable without a fully defined playbook', 'technically curious, don't need to be an engineer'. Brand-new posting (4d, G=88) at a ~40-person founder-led Series A = human hiring-manager read in a low-competition window. Green momentum (H=88, doubled to $26M ~1 Jun 2026). Diversifies the top-5 away from pure ops-generalist into agent-delivery.
top5.caveat: Core is customer delivery/implementation + compliance/governance in REGULATED financial services - adjacent to but not Ryan's community-led spike, so he meets the bar without standing out; a fintech-ops candidate is more directly differentiated. (Scored under the older system - callback_v3=77 used as proxy; not operator-rescored.)
top5.apply_move: Apply NOW while the posting is fresh; frame ambiguity-navigation + cross-functional founder-associate execution hard, and lean on the 'technically curious, not an engineer' framing to neutralise the no-SWE concern.

top5.title: Founder's Associate
top5.why: The single best operator-FIT in the entire set despite a mid numeric rank (it lacks callback_op so sorts low on the primary key). Role spans 'product, sales, community, operations, research, hiring' with founders - near-IDENTICAL to Ryan's actual Minima FA->Community->Marketing arc - and explicitly wants community-building (his 100k Discord/ambassador spike, his rarest differentiator). Best-in-batch warm path: direct founder-inbox apply (E=90), no ATS. London, VC/startup-data domain (adjacent, not anti-fit).
top5.caveat: 1-2yr target + £42k band floor (< his £50k floor) - he could read as over-leveled/expensive, and the seat is an undatable evergreen (could be long-standing/picky). Verify the seat is genuinely open and negotiate the band in the note.
top5.apply_move: Email careers@tryspecter.com directly with a tight, tailored note connecting his literal FA-at-a-scaling-startup experience + 100k community build + crypto/startup-signal fluency to Specter's deal-sourcing/community mission - this bypasses any ATS and lands on a human.

top5.title: Chief of Staff
top5.why: Included for the single highest-leverage application CHANNEL in the entire set: a 300-word email straight to the founder (rajen@governr.ai) with a promised 48-hour response - best-in-batch on warm-path AND screening (E=95, C=95), zero ATS. D_spike_operator 72: founder-level generalist ownership (investor pitch + workflow design + strategy docs) maps to his FA/fundraising-ops/ambiguity-to-structure spikes. CoS is founder-adjacent (not exec-excluded). Diversifies into a true founder-read seat.
top5.caveat: Two real caveats: (1) the same-day standalone FINANCIAL-MODELLING expectation is a genuine stretch he hasn't explicitly evidenced; (2) the LISTING is stale (LinkedIn expired) and AI-governance is off his crypto/community spikes - so confirm the seat is still open inside the email itself.
top5.apply_move: Send a sharp 300-word pitch to rajen@governr.ai leading with seed->Series A first-employee operator credibility, fundraising-support + strategy-doc track record, and AI-native (Claude Code) building - and explicitly ask whether the CoS seat is still open.
